new_classes.label_en: PDO wine other than Tokaj, in containers holding ≤ 2 l — other (CN 2204 21 74)
new_classes.label_de: Wein mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung (g.U.), kein Tokajwein, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger — anderer (KN 2204 21 74)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) other than Tokaj, presented in containers of 2 litres or less, not being sparkling wine (CN 2204 10), not being semi-sparkling wine (CN 2204 21 09), and not classified under CN 2204 21 23 (Tokaj) or 2204 21 68 (other PDO). This code covers the residual 'other' PDO still wine category in containers ≤ 2 l as defined under CN 2204 21 74, pursuant to additional note 6(a) of Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The core distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) PDO wine quality (via eucn:PDOWineQuality), (2) container ≤ 2 l (via eucn:SmallContainer), (3) exclusion of Tokaj (complement of TokajOriginQuality), (4) exclusion of sparkling wine (complement of SparklingWineQuality), and (5) exclusion of semi-sparkling wine (complement of SemiSparklingWineQuality). The coverage is reduced to 0.75 because: (a) the 'other' residual nature of this code within the PDO family (2204 21 11–78 range) cannot be fully formalised without enumerating all the other specific PDO subheadings (e.g. specific named PDOs such as those under 2204 21 11–38, 2204 21 62, 2204 21 66, 2204 21 68) that must be excluded; the running TBox only has Tokaj (22042123) and one other PDO residual (22042168) defined — the full sibling exclusion set is not available in the current TBox; (b) additional note 6(a) references specific PDO definitions under EU wine legislation that cannot be further formalised without a dedicated Wine PDO vocabulary not present in the current TBox.
